title: Web Development Basics
content:
Web development is the process of building and maintaining websites. It involves a variety of tasks, including web design, content creation, and client-side or server-side coding. A solid understanding of web development is crucial for anyone looking to pursue a career in web technologies, whether as a front-end developer, back-end developer, or full-stack developer.

Key Components of Web Development

  • HTML: The backbone of any web page. HTML provides the structure and content.
  • CSS: CSS is used to style and format the layout of a web page, including colors, fonts, and spacing.
  • JavaScript: JavaScript adds interactivity to websites. It allows you to create dynamic content, like animations, form validation, and data manipulation.
  • Web Hosting: A web hosting service is necessary to make your website accessible over the internet. It stores your website's files and makes them available to users.

Popular Tools & Technologies

Some of the most popular include: React, Angular, Node.js, Bootstrap.

title: Front-End Development
content:
Front-end development is focused on the user interface and experience. It involves creating everything that users interact with on the web. A front-end developer typically works with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and front-end libraries or frameworks like React or Angular.

Core Skills for Front-End Development

  • HTML/CSS: The building blocks of front-end development.
  • JavaScript: Adding interactivity to websites.
  • Responsive Design: Ensuring that websites are mobile-friendly.
